name: Michael Brecker
abstract: Michael Leonard Brecker (March 29, 1949 – January 13, 2007) was an American jazz saxophonist and composer. Over a four‑decade career, he recorded widely in jazz and popular music and appeared on more than 900 albums as a leader and sideman.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: So, this was a really interesting line-up, of Charlie and the contrasting styles of Michael Brecker and Dewey Redman. We actually did some dates in Europe to promote the record... It was a great combination band.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Sandke
about_quotes.evidence: hired, got Mike Brecker and Jim McNealy and John Goldsby, Kenny Washington and did all originals in a modern context. That was my first record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Sandke interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Kent Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: And you know Michael Brecker, he’s a friend of mine, he said the same thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kent Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 22, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Kidd Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: Like the average kid now, a cat will say, “man I hear some kids say I’d love to play like Michael Brecker if I could”... But they don’t know Michael Brecker’s got the technique to do that.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kidd Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: That was more Mike’s baby, you know, like he’d kind of guide the way. That’s a long association in my life, in my career too, because I’ve been playing with him for 46 years now.
about_quotes.doc_title: Warren Bernhardt interviewed by Monk Rowe, Bearsville, New York, January 3, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Lou Marini
about_quotes.evidence: we would be on sessions and the saxophones would be Mike Brecker and Ronnie Cuber and Dave Sanborn and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lou Marini interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 15, 2023
